response.global_analysis: 1. Transcription & Translation: Performed accurate transcription of the opening vocal track 'Deep Dive' and Todoroki Hajime's subsequent birthday merchandise talk segment. 2. Reference JSON Usage: Utilized the context from the Reference JSON regarding the performer's name and track titles, but performed manual transcription for the opening vocal track and the talk segment, as no lyrics/script were provided. 3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitles are precisely anchored to Hajime's rapid, out-of-breath speech, applying logical sentence groupings and truncation to prevent cascading delays. No subtitles are output during the purely instrumental dance segments.

subtitles.original: Girl, you look like that, girl. 街を騒がす bad
subtitles.english: Girl, you look like that, girl. Stirring up the town, bad

subtitles.original: まさに queen, hot queen, hot queen!
subtitles.english: Just like a queen, hot queen, hot queen!

subtitles.original: はい、ということで、生誕グッズが出ました！
subtitles.english: Yes! And so, my birthday merchandise is out!

subtitles.original: 轟はじめ誕生日記念2026のフルセットはこんな感じです！
subtitles.english: This is the Todoroki Hajime Birthday Celebration 2026 Full Set!

subtitles.original: 一つずつ紹介していきまーす！
subtitles.english: Let me introduce them one by one!

subtitles.original: 一つ目！ぶんぶんぱんちょーアクリルスタンド！
subtitles.english: First! The Bunbun Bancho Acrylic Stand!

subtitles.original: イラストは、A5き先生に描いていただきました！
subtitles.english: The illustration was drawn by A5ki-sensei!

subtitles.original: 台座がね、フチがあるので、座ってる風にも、いろんなフチに、机とかのフチに引っかけても使えます！
subtitles.english: Since the base has an edge, you can display it as if she's sitting on a desk edge or any edge!

subtitles.original: 怒っているのがポイントです！
subtitles.english: Her angry expression is the highlight!

subtitles.original: 二つ目は、はじめとおそろいチョーカー！
subtitles.english: Second is the matching choker with Hajime!

subtitles.original: はじめの新衣装とおそろいのチョーカーです！星のチャームが可愛い！
subtitles.english: It's a choker matching Hajime's new outfit! The star charm is so cute!

subtitles.original: 首のサイズが合わないよっていう方は、痛バッグなどに、つけてください！
subtitles.english: For those whose neck size doesn't fit, please attach it to your ita-bag!

subtitles.original: 三つ目は、BANCHOジャージ！
subtitles.english: Third is the BANCHO Track Jacket!

subtitles.original: えー、裏面のイラストは、おもちチャウダーちゃんに描いていただきました！
subtitles.english: The illustration on the back was drawn by Omochi Chowder-chan!

subtitles.original: 表面は刺繍になってます。
subtitles.english: The front has embroidery.

subtitles.original: スバル先輩のね、生地がとても良かったので、同じのにしていただきました！
subtitles.english: Since Subaru-senpai's jacket material was so good, I had them make it with the same material!

subtitles.original: 最後、ぬいぐるみキーホルダー、ブラックオーロラ衣装バージョン！
subtitles.english: Finally, the Plushie Key Chain, Black Aurora Outfit Version!

subtitles.original: 初めて出した人気のぬいぐるみの、新衣装バージョンです！
subtitles.english: It's the new outfit version of the popular plushie we released for the first time!

subtitles.original: あの時買えなかったよっていう方、ぜひお迎えしてください！
subtitles.english: Those who couldn't buy it back then, please do welcome her home!

subtitles.original: そして、フルセット特典はこちら！
subtitles.english: And here is the full set bonus!

subtitles.original: 今回のライブの、チケット風カード！全員に直筆サイン書かせていただきます！
subtitles.english: A ticket-style card from today's live concert! I will personally hand-sign each one!

subtitles.original: えー、去年のね、ライブでたくさんグッズを買っていただいたおかげで、
subtitles.english: Thanks to everyone buying so much merchandise at last year's concert,

subtitles.original: 今年もこんなに、力を入れることができました！ありがとうございます！
subtitles.english: we were able to put so much effort into it again this year! Thank you so much!

subtitles.original: 今回のライブも楽しんでいただけただろうか？
subtitles.english: I hope you enjoyed today's live concert too!

subtitles.original: ぜひね、グッズもお迎えしていただけると、今後の励みになります！よろしくお願いします！
subtitles.english: If you could also get the merchandise, it will motivate me going forward! Thank you!

subtitles.original: 以上、グッズ紹介でしたー！
subtitles.english: That's all for the merchandise introduction!

subtitles.original: あー、しんどかった！
subtitles.english: Ah, that was exhausting!

subtitles.original: このあと、ラストスパート！
subtitles.english: Next up is the last spurt!

subtitles.original: 一緒に盛り上がっていってください、いきますよー！えい！
subtitles.english: Let's keep getting hyped up together! Here we go! Yeah!
